growth_records.cite: Madin JS et al. A synthesis of bacterial and archaeal phenotypic trait data. Sci Data 7:170 (2020); source dataset: engqvist.
growth_records.notes: Species-level trait record; culture mode/pH often unspecified; medium + uptake/secretion pending literature curation.

growth_records.medium: Peptone cellulose solution (PCS) medium with CMC

up.method: experimentally measured glucose uptake rate vs dry cell biomass; used to constrain GEM; numeric value reported in Table S5 (supplementary, not in main text)

growth_records.cite: Kundu, Pritam et al. Genome-Scale Community Model-Guided Development of Bacterial Coculture for Lignocellulose Bioconversion. Biotechnology and Bioengineering (2025). DOI:10.1002/bit.28918. [PMC11895418]
growth_records.snippet: P2 Kluyvera sp. P2 ... Experimental growth rate Mean 0.166 SD 0.0089
growth_records.notes: Table 1: experimental growth rate (h^-1) mean=0.166 SD=0.0089 for Kluyvera sp. P2; in-silico FBA growth rate=0.147 h^-1. Doubling time td=ln2/mu=0.6931/0.166=4.176 h. Aerobic batch shake-flask in PCS medium (0.5% peptone, 0.5% NaCl, 0.1% yeast extract, 0.15% CaCO3, 0.5% cellulosic material), pH 7.2, 37C, 120 rpm, 72 h. Glucose uptake rate measured experimentally per strain to constrain models (Table S5) but numeric value not in main text. Strain isolated from wood-feeding termite gut.

growth_records.medium: Peptone cellulose solution (PCS) medium with CMC

up.method: per-strain experimental glucose uptake used to constrain member GEMs (Table S5); community value not tabulated

growth_records.cite: Kundu, Pritam et al. Genome-Scale Community Model-Guided Development of Bacterial Coculture for Lignocellulose Bioconversion. Biotechnology and Bioengineering (2025). DOI:10.1002/bit.28918. [PMC11895418]
growth_records.method: reported (experimentally measured community growth rate, SD=0.026 h^-1)
growth_records.snippet: Kluyvera sp. P2 + Brevibacterium sp. P5 ... Community growth (h-1) 0.301 SD 0.026 ; Sum of individual 0.292 ; DES 1.031
growth_records.notes: Table 2: experimental community (co-culture) growth rate=0.301 h^-1 (SD 0.026); sum of individual monoculture growth rates=0.292 h^-1 (SD 0.011). Doubling time td=ln2/mu=0.6931/0.301=2.303 h. Model-derived Avg PGSI=0.011, Avg PMA=0.054; experimental degree of enzymatic synergism DES=1.031. Growth increment vs sum-of-individuals is the synergism metric. Aerobic batch shake-flask coculture in PCS-CMC medium, pH 7.2, 37C, 120 rpm, 72 h.

phenotypes.base_medium: Acid/gas-production test: peptone/complex base + substrate + pH indicator — positive = fermentative acid production, NOT growth on the substrate as a sole carbon source (interpret with care for model validation)
phenotypes.citation: BacDive strain 145899 (Reimer LC et al., BacDive 2022, NAR); https://bacdive.dsmz.de/strain/145899
